permissions.disk_access_message: Please grant Full Disk Access permission in System Preferences to read the Messages database.
permissions.disk_access_detail: System Preferences > Security & Privacy > Privacy > Full Disk Access
permissions.accessibility_message: Please grant Accessibility permission to enable auto-paste functionality.
permissions.accessibility_detail: System Preferences > Security & Privacy > Privacy > Accessibility

settings.auto_paste_desc: Automatically paste verification codes to the active window
settings.auto_return_desc: Automatically press Enter after pasting (requires Auto Paste to be enabled)
settings.launch_at_login_desc: Automatically start MessAuto when the system starts

messages.no_verification_codes_desc: When new SMS verification codes are detected, they will be displayed here
messages.auto_return_requires_paste: Auto Enter requires Auto Paste to be enabled first

about.title: About MessAuto
about.description: An Electron-based macOS desktop application for automatically extracting SMS verification codes and enabling auto-paste and auto-enter functionality.
